summary: Pool Funnel Complete Testing - Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified for Business and Creator. Fixed critical backend bug where /pools/my/* routes were being matched as pool_id.

fixed_during_testing.issue: Routes were incorrectly ordered - /pools/{pool_id} was matching before /pools/my/* causing 404 'Pool not found' errors
fixed_during_testing.fix: Moved /pools/my/* routes BEFORE /pools/{pool_id} routes in server.py

issues: React key warnings in console - 'Encountered two children with the same key' on /dashboard page

passed_tests: Business login with testbusiness@emergent.org
Creator login with testagent@emergent.org
GET /api/pools - Business lists own pools
GET /api/pools - Creator lists active pools
GET /api/pools/{pool_id} - Pool details with ui_summary for business
GET /api/pools/{pool_id} - Pool details with ui_arena for creator
GET /api/pools/{pool_id}/applications - Business views applications
GET /api/pools/{pool_id}/submissions - Business views submissions
GET /api/pools/{pool_id}/payouts - Business views payouts
GET /api/pools/{pool_id}/leaderboard - Anyone views leaderboard
GET /api/pools/my/applications - Creator views own applications
GET /api/pools/my/participations - Creator views own participations
GET /api/pools/my/submissions - Creator views own submissions
POST /api/pools - Only business can create pools (403 for creators)
POST /api/pools/{pool_id}/join - Only creators can join (403 for business)
GET /api/pools/nonexistent - Returns 404 correctly
Pool with requires_approval=true shows 'Candidature requise' badge
UI: Business sidebar has 'Pool' menu pointing to /business/pools
UI: BusinessPoolsPage shows pools with filters (Actives/En pause/Terminées)
UI: BusinessPoolDetailPage shows Candidatures tab for approval pools
UI: Creator sidebar has 'Pool' menu pointing to /pool
UI: ArenaPage shows pools with 'Participer' or 'Voir la campagne' buttons
UI: PoolDetailPage shows brief, badges, participation status
UI: Submit content modal opens with platform selector and URL input
action_items: Fix React key warnings on /dashboard page (duplicate keys in list rendering)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend route ordering fix was critical - /pools/my/* must come before /pools/{pool_id}
All Pool endpoints correctly enforce user_type permissions (business vs creator)
requires_approval workflow properly implemented with application status tracking
UI correctly shows different CTAs based on participation state (Join/Apply/Pending/Rejected/Submit)
seed_data_creation: Used existing Test Brand Approval pool (pool_da12bc6ed1df) with requires_approval=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pool funnel is fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_pool_funnel.py. Creator 'testagent' is already approved in 'Test Brand Approval' pool and has 2 submissions. The route ordering bug has been fixed - /pools/my/* routes must come BEFORE /pools/{pool_id} routes.

features_verified.arena_page: Shows pools with Participer/Voir la campagne buttons ✅
features_verified.pool_detail_page: Shows brief, 'Candidature requise' badge, participation status ✅
features_verified.apply_modal: Modal with motivation message for approval pools ✅

rca_of_the_issue.issue: API endpoints /api/pools/my/applications and /api/pools/my/submissions returning 404 'Pool not found'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering issue - /pools/{pool_id} route was defined BEFORE /pools/my/* routes, causing 'my' to be interpreted as a pool_id
reproduction_steps: 3. Server interprets this as GET /api/pools/my/applications where pool_id='my'
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Moved all /pools/my/* route definitions BEFORE /pools/{pool_id} routes in server.py (lines 4375-4405)
